untranslatable_reason: Signal requires historical regime pattern matching (2-year lookback, 6+ occurrences per year, consistency threshold) which cannot be expressed as point-in-time indicator conditions. The core concept—selecting markets matching historical characteristics—requires regime backtesting or machine learning classification not available in the allowed indicator set. Used proxy indicators (hvol_20, adx_14) to approximate volatility/trend strength requirements, but cannot encode the frequency-of-occurrence or multi-year historical pattern matching logic.
translation_notes: This is a market selection/regime compatibility rule rather than a traditional entry/exit signal. Translated qualitative requirements to quantitative proxies: 'high volatility' → hvol_20 ≥ 0.01 (1% annual volatility), 'trend strength' → adx_14 ≥ 25. Exit condition approximates 3-week deterioration. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because suitability varies by strategy. Parameters show intended 2-year lookback and 6x/year frequency thresholds but cannot be operationalized within indicator constraints.
